# freeswitch_callcenter_agent (Data Source)

Looks up an existing mod_callcenter agent by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_callcenter_agent" "agent_4201" {
  name = "4201@192.168.48.143"
}

output "agent_contact" {
  value = data.freeswitch_callcenter_agent.agent_4201.contact
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `contact` (String)
- `max_no_answer` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `wrap_up_time` (Number)
